title: rubus × fulgens
intro: Rubus × fulgens, also known as the Raspberry Leaf, is a hybrid plant species in the Rubus genus, commonly used in herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Rubus × fulgens include its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it effective in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × fulgens include its ability to ease menstrual cramps, reduce fever, and support digestive health, making it a popular choice among herbalists and naturopaths. Rubus × fulgens is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be consumed as a dried leaf or capsule supplement.
